content.en:
Ye Tian finally understood at this moment why those extra-dimensional realms could only come in and comprehend nine times, it was really because the Tricky Wood Red Dragon only allowed those extra-dimensional realms to comprehend nine times, and once they exceeded, they would wake up and kill them, and by the way, kill other extra-dimensional realms.

After all, those extradimensional realms are also waste materials, and there is no point in keeping them.

Sometimes, even if he didn't have the extradimensional realm to comprehend more than nine times, he would occasionally wake up and kill these extradimensional realms.

"Little one, if you are willing to cooperate with me, if you want, I will give you benefits, if you are willing, I will kill you directly. The Tricky Wood Red Dragon threatened.

"What's the benefit?"

Ye Tian asked.

"A replica of a multi-dimensional bottle!"

Tricky Wood Red Dragon said.

"Duowei Treasure Bottle Imitation, what is Duowei Treasure Bottle?" Ye Tian heard of Duowei Treasure Bottle for the first time, and what he didn't know was that it was Duowei Treasure Bottle that the Six-Winged Family snatched at the beginning, and it was destroyed because it was also it.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon showed a look of disdain, "I haven't even heard of the treasure of the Duowei Treasure Bottle, forget it, I'll introduce it to you, the position we are in now is the Six Thousand Territory, and all the extra-dimensional territories after the No. 1 Territory to the Six Thousand Territory are collectively called the Multi-Dimensional Domain, and the Multi-Dimensional Domain will give birth to some innate multi-dimensional treasures one after another, even if it is an ordinary innate multi-dimensional treasure, its value is far above the super-dimensional Dao soldiers." It is worth mentioning that the multi-dimensional treasure bottle has been split into hundreds for special reasons, and each multi-dimensional treasure bottle exists alone. If all the multi-dimensional treasure bottles are fused together, it will become the top innate multi-dimensional treasure. Unfortunately, it is difficult to find all of these vases, and some of them have been completely shattered and turned into countless fragments, and it is almost impossible to find them all. "

"And this imitation in my hand is made of a fragment of a multi-dimensional treasure bottle and many top materials, and its effect is about one-tenth of that of a multi-dimensional treasure bottle, but even so, its value is unimaginable, even the third realm has to go crazy for it." "

After the Tricky Wood Red Dragon finished speaking, Ye Tian showed full interest.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, what is the function of the Duowei Treasure Bottle?" Ye Tian asked again.

Weimu Chilong introduced: "In fact, different multi-dimensional treasure bottles, their functions are different, most of the multi-dimensional treasure bottles have the effect of condensing multi-dimensional essence, assisting in the comprehension of super-dimensional rules, and some multi-dimensional treasure bottles condense special multi-dimensional essences, these multi-dimensional essences can temper the body of the super-dimensional realm, so that its physical body reaches an incredible level, and even some multi-dimensional essences can make the super-dimensional realm immortal and indestructible, almost difficult to kill." And this multi-dimensional bottle imitation in my hand can condense a diluted multi-dimensional essence, and can also assist in comprehending the rules of extra-dimensionality. I can make you comprehend my scales, let you improve the extradimensional rules, and this multidimensional treasure bottle also plays a role, if it were not for it, I would not dare to let you continue to comprehend the extradimensional rules for endless years. "

"Choose, cooperate with me, and let me out when you step into the fourth realm. If you don't cooperate, I'll kill you. "

The voice of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon froze, as if he had no patience to wait any longer.

"I choose to cooperate!"

Ye Tian said.

For him, this is undoubtedly the most cost-effective choice, if he does not cooperate, this replica body will be killed, if he chooses to cooperate, he can get a replica of the Duowei Bao bottle, which is undoubtedly the best choice.

"Good. "

"But you still have to make an extradimensional oath that when you step into the fourth realm in the future, you must come and release me, and you must not harm me in any way. Otherwise, the superdimensional Dao species will collapse and the will will dissipate......"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon asked for so.

He is not stupid, in case Ye Tian really becomes the fourth realm one day later, release it and kill it, wouldn't it be finished.

Therefore, Ye Tian must be asked to make the superdimensional oath in advance.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian also agreed.

Immediately, he made an extradimensional oath.

After the superdimensional oath was made, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon finally took out the imitation of the Duowei Treasure Bottle and handed it to Ye Tian.

"This is an imitation of the Duoweibao bottle?"

Ye Tian sensed a wisp of familiarity from this multi-dimensional treasure bottle.

This breath ......

"The black statue!"

Ye Tian suddenly remembered that the black statue in the ruins of the Kuntong Realm Lord was also because of this black statue that it was heavily injured by the Holy Sea Realm Lord and caused it to fall.

So, the black statue is an innate multi-dimensional treasure?

"It's also possible that it's just a part of the Innate Multidimensional Arcana!"

But no matter what, as long as it is related to the innate multi-dimensional treasure, its value is extremely terrifying, not to mention the third realm, even the fourth realm will be extremely desired.

Ye Tian directly took away this Duowei Bao bottle imitation.

At this time, the tricky wood red dragon reminded: "Little guy, don't leak this imitation of the Duowei Treasure Bottle, even if it is an imitation, the value is comparable to that of a high-level super dimensional Dao soldier, the third realm will be crazy, maybe some of the fourth realm will also be snatched." This thing doesn't have much effect on the Fourth Realm, but it is very valuable to a faction, and it can be used to cultivate the little ones in the faction. "

"Thanks for the reminder. "

Ye Tian said. []

"Okay, I'll send you out, and in the future, this place will be completely closed, and no extradimensional realm will be allowed to enter, if you don't reach the fourth realm, don't come in. "

The power on the body of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon exploded, and a force swept through Ye Tian's body, and then directly moved Ye Tian out.

......

Outside.

Death Void.

Ye Tian appeared in a strange territory.

This is not outside the Red Dragon Rim, but a place far away from the Red Dragon Rim (Mo Zhao's).

"Go back first!"

After Ye Tian found the right direction, he immediately returned to the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two.

After returning to the Terrans, he arranged a number of extradimensional formations, and only then did he take out the imitation of the multidimensional treasure bottle.

Subsequently, it took him a little time to refine and recognize this Duowei Bao Bottle Imitation, and only then did he figure out the use of this Duowei Bao Bottle Imitation.

"You need to sacrifice the flesh and blood of many extradimensional realms to condense the multidimensional essence!"

At this time, Ye Tian remembered the Six-Winged Family.

At the beginning, the Six-Winged Family harmed a group of extra-dimensional realms, and after those extra-dimensional realms and the nine-star pluto snake fell, they were absorbed by a treasure and flesh and blood.

Looking at it this way, it looks like a multi-dimensional treasure bottle!

"Could it be that the Six-Winged Family snatched the Duowei Treasure Bottle from the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan in the first place, and then the Duowei Treasure Bottle leaked, so it will be destroyed?"
